# Bigger Fish Intelligent Automation

> Custom automation infrastructure for independent operators.

Bigger Fish is a Maine-based automation firm founded in 2024 by Jared Fischer. We build bespoke automation systems — not templates, not subscriptions, not platforms. Each engagement is scoped, built, and handed off (or run on retainer).

## What we build

- **Custom automation systems** — n8n, Make, or code-first pipelines connecting your tools
- **AI-native applications** — voice, chat, and document-processing workflows powered by Gemini, Claude, and local LLMs
- **CRM and operational infrastructure** — for independent operators who need real tools, not SaaS bloat

## Products

- [D-slop](https://biggerfish.io/d-slop.html) — Chrome extension that detects and highlights AI-generated content. Free.
- [Outcome Engineer](https://biggerfish.io/outcome-engineer.html) — Automated review routing for independent restaurants. Positive feedback routes to Google; negative stays private.
- [Turingyde](https://turingyde.com) — Local-first, subscription-free CRM. Data lives on your device.

## Engagement models

**Project Build** — Fixed scope, fixed fee. We map, build, test, and hand you the keys. You own the code.

**Retained Operations** — Monthly retainer. We run and grow the system. Three tiers: Operator ($X/mo), Fabricator ($X/mo), Architect ($X/mo).

See [terms-conditions.html](https://biggerfish.io/terms-conditions.html) for full details.
